nicecatch.hint.charge: Release to cast — power follows the bar
nicecatch.hint.bite: Bite! Right-click to set the hook!
nicecatch.hint.loot_bite: Something's on the line! Right-click to reel it in
nicecatch.hint.reel: Hold right-click and circle your mouse to reel it in
nicecatch.hint.reel_empty: Reeling in — circle your mouse to reel faster
nicecatch.hint.reel_item: Reeling in the catch — no rush, it won't get away
nicecatch.hint.run: It's running! Ease off and pull the rod up
nicecatch.hint.phase.sweep: It's thrashing — keep on it and reel
nicecatch.hint.phase.sound: It's sounding — pull the rod up to lift it!
nicecatch.hint.phase.charge: It's charging — reel fast, take up the slack!
nicecatch.hint.tension: Line about to snap — stop cranking!
nicecatch.hint.tired: It's worn out — reel it home!
